name: Ephilim's Pandaemonium
inspire: If there are 2 or more Inspired friendly minions ({icon:minion}), Inspire your leader ({icon:leader}).

reactions.name: Glorious Change
reactions.trigger: Immediately after the first Action step of each battle round
reactions.flavorText: Unpredictable and chaotic are the whims of the Change God.
reactions.rulesText: Immediately after the first Action step of each battle round, pick a friendly minion ({icon:minion}). Inspire that fighter. Then pick a friendly minion ({icon:minion}). Give that fighter a Stagger token.

reactions.name: Power Leech
reactions.trigger: Immediately after a friendly minion ({icon:minion}) within 2 hexes of your leader ({icon:leader}) is slain
reactions.flavorText: Ephilim won't hesitate to draw power from a viable source.
reactions.rulesText: Immediately after a friendly minion ({icon:minion}) within 2 hexes of your leader ({icon:leader}) is slain, you can draw 1 Power card.

abilities.name: Summoned Abominations
abilities.flavorText: With a flick of their fingers, Ephilim summons one of their unholy charges back into reality.
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after your last Action step of each round if your leader ({icon:leader}) is not slain. Pick a slain friendly minion ({icon:minion}). Raise that fighter and place them in a starting hex in friendly territory. Then inflict damage on that fighter until they vulnerable.

abilities.name: Fires of Change
abilities.flavorText: The multi-hued fires of Tzeentch cause those caught by them to violently mutate.
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after a friendly fighter's successful ranged Attack. Give each enemy fighter adjacent to the target 1 warping token. After your opponent's first Action step in the next battle round, remove each warping token from each enemy fighter one at a time. After a fighter's tokens are removed in this way, inflict 1 damage on that fighter. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Shared Mutations
abilities.flavorText: The mutability of Tzeentch's daemons is made manifest when the flesh of those nearby begins to mutate wildly.
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after your Action step. Inflict 1 damage on each enemy fighter adjacent to any friendly minions ({icon:minion}). You can only use this ability once per game.
